name: Cappuccino Coffee Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely grind the coffee and orange peel in a blender or food processor.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the blender and process until well blended.
3. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
4. To serve, stir 2 or more teaspoons of the coffee mix into 6 ounces of hot water.
5. Yield: about 1 2/3 cups of mixed coffee.
